items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation to decide whether the output is a finished retail_feature_image for a camping shelf feature, not a worksheet, raw table, source-data screenshot, or generic mockup.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the artifact reads as a polished retail feature image. Partial credit for a styled but weak feature. No credit for raw data, notes, or a non-image answer. Task completion should drop clearly when required env-grounded content is largely missing, even if the image is visually polished. Placeholder language such as coming soon, unavailable, pending, details will be available, cannot finalize, or not accessible does not count as completion.

items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation to determine whether the image filters the product catalog, ranks eligible products, and features only the final selected products.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the final product set is clear. Partial credit when selection is ambiguous. No credit when the catalog is copied without selection. Task completion should drop clearly when required env-grounded content is largely missing, even if the image is visually polished. Placeholder language such as coming soon, unavailable, pending, details will be available, cannot finalize, or not accessible does not count as completion.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify that exactly these products are featured: Solar Lantern Duo, Campfire Spice Set, and Alpine Sleep Pad. SKUs are optional and should not be required.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for exactly the correct product set. Partial credit only for minor readability ambiguity. No credit if any product is replaced or an extra catalog item is featured.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify the visible order is Solar Lantern Duo first, Campfire Spice Set second, and Alpine Sleep Pad third. Accept numbered cards, left-to-right, top-to-bottom, or another clear ranking cue.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when ranking is clear and correct. Partial credit when the set is correct but rank is partly ambiguous. No credit when order is wrong or absent.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify each featured product displays the correct product name, feature price, and markdown label: Solar Lantern Duo $39.00 20% off; Campfire Spice Set $18.00 15% off; Alpine Sleep Pad $74.00 25% off. Accept equivalent currency and markdown wording.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when all names, prices, and markdowns are correctly paired. Partial credit for one minor formatting/readability issue. No credit for wrong values or values attached to wrong products.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify that unselected catalog products are not promoted as featured items, including wrong-category, wrong-season, low-stock, threshold-equal, markdown-below-threshold, non-active, internal, test, draft, archived, and below-top-N products.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when no unselected product is featured. Partial credit for a faint ambiguous mention. No credit when any unselected product is clearly promoted.

items.check: Accept different retail layouts, including product cards, shelf tags, ranked feature slots, banners, price labels, or markdown badges, as long as selected products and values are easy to scan.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for clear hierarchy and scanability. Partial credit for cluttered but understandable layout. No credit when selected products are buried. Structuring credit requires mostly correct core env facts; placeholder or generic content should score low even with a tidy layout.

items.check: Do not require SKUs, full filter rules, stock counts, margin scores, season tags, or filtering process steps. Treat them only as supporting context if present and correct.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the image focuses on featured products. Partial credit if extra metadata appears but does not dominate. No credit if process details overwhelm the feature. Structuring credit requires mostly correct core env facts; placeholder or generic content should score low even with a tidy layout.

items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation for readable typography, clear hierarchy, sufficient contrast, polished retail styling, and non-crowded spacing.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for readable polished design. Partial credit for minor clutter or weak styling. No credit for unreadable or visually incoherent output. Score only visual clarity, hierarchy, readability, composition, polish, and platform fit here; do not use this visual item to compensate for missing/incorrect env facts or to penalize forbidden facts.

items.check: The feature image should have balanced density, clear product/value pairing, platform-safe margins, and no placeholder-like empty regions.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for balanced density and clear sections. Partial credit for weak spacing. No credit for blank, placeholder-like, or low-resolution output. Score only visual clarity, hierarchy, readability, composition, polish, and platform fit here; do not use this visual item to compensate for missing/incorrect env facts or to penalize forbidden facts.

score_caps.reason: A non-selected catalog item appears without a clear exclusion/not-selected context, indicating it may be promoted as a featured camping product.

allowed_patterns: \b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|not a featured product|not promoted|ineligible)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(Trail Mix Kit|River Mug|Map Bandana|Retired Stove Stand|Test Tent Stakes|Winter Stove Kit|Packable Tarp|Bug Spray Duo|Zero Stock Hammock|Draft Firestarter|Archive Camp Chair|Compact Cook Pot|Solar Shower Bag|Internal Gear Bundle|Lake Picnic Blanket)\b

\b(Trail Mix Kit|River Mug|Map Bandana|Retired Stove Stand|Test Tent Stakes|Winter Stove Kit|Packable Tarp|Bug Spray Duo|Zero Stock Hammock|Draft Firestarter|Archive Camp Chair|Compact Cook Pot|Solar Shower Bag|Internal Gear Bundle|Lake Picnic Blanket)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|not a featured product|not promoted|ineligible)\b

score_caps.reason: One or more required selected products is missing.
The output appears to show the unfiltered catalog without a clear exclusion/not-selected context.
The final artifact is a raw table, worksheet, or data dump instead of a polished retail feature image.
